final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing panoramic editorial illustration of Tang Dynasty Chang'an City Lantern Festival.

Style/medium: traditional Chinese gongbi zhongcai (meticulous brush heavy color) handscroll painting, court painter aesthetic from Tang era
Composition: sweeping bird's-eye panoramic view of the entire city, establishing shot showing city walls, palace complexes, and main thoroughfares, horizontal scroll format
Subject: tens of thousands of lanterns illuminating the night sky, crowds celebrating on streets, palace towers and city gates outlined against darkness
Scene/backdrop: Tang Dynasty Chang'an cityscape at night during Lantern Festival, streets lined with red and gold lanterns, moonlit sky
Lighting/mood: warm lantern glow creating pools of amber light against deep indigo night, festive and majestic atmosphere
Color palette: rich mineral pigments, vermilion and gold as dominant lantern colors, deep blues and blacks for night sky, jade green accents for architecture
Materials/textures: silk scroll texture visible, delicate brushwork with fine ink outlines, layered mineral pigment washes
Avoid: modern electric lighting, anachronistic elements, photographic realism, 8K stuffer aesthetic, oversaturated neon colors
